nodes.name: env.py
nodes.summary: Alembic migration environment configuration that wires the async SQLAlchemy engine and app models into offline and online migration runs.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an async SQLAlchemy engine bridged into Alembic's sync migration runner via run_sync.

nodes.name: run_migrations_offline
nodes.summary: Configures and runs Alembic migrations in offline mode using a database URL string without a live connection.

nodes.name: run_async_migrations
nodes.summary: Creates an async engine from Alembic config and runs migrations synchronously within an async connection context.

nodes.name: run_migrations_online
nodes.summary: Entry point that drives asyncio to execute the async online migration flow.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker file for the app package.

nodes.name: log.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy models for audit logging, defining a shared base log table and three subtype tables for invoicing, stock-in, and admin events.

nodes.name: _BaseLog
nodes.summary: Abstract base ORM model holding common audit log fields: shop, actor user, event type, payload, and timestamp.

nodes.name: InvoicingLog
nodes.summary: Audit log table recording invoicing-related events such as checkout finalization and voids.

nodes.name: StockinLog
nodes.summary: Audit log table recording stock-receiving (lot creation) events.

nodes.name: AdminLog
nodes.summary: Audit log table recording administrative events such as staff management changes.

nodes.name: lot.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy models representing stock-receiving lots and their per-product line items.

nodes.name: Lot
nodes.summary: ORM model for a stock-receiving event, holding reference/notes metadata, the receiving user, shop, and its line items.

nodes.name: LotLine
nodes.summary: ORM model for a single product-quantity line within a lot, linking to both the lot and the product.

nodes.name: lot.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for lot creation requests and API responses, including validation that lot lines have unique barcodes.

nodes.name: LotCreate
nodes.summary: Request schema for creating a lot, validating that its line items reference unique barcodes.

nodes.name: LotPublic
nodes.summary: Response schema representing a lot with its metadata and line items for API output.

nodes.name: test_checkout.py
nodes.summary: Integration test suite covering checkout finalization: single/multi-line invoices, split payments, idempotency, concurrency on last-unit stock, role permissions, invoice immutability, audit logging, and PDF generation.

nodes.name: test_two_concurrent_finalizes_for_last_unit_only_one_wins
nodes.summary: Verifies that when two concurrent checkout requests race for the last unit of stock, only one finalizes successfully and the other fails cleanly.

nodes.name: test_idempotency_key_replay_returns_same_invoice
nodes.summary: Verifies that replaying a checkout request with the same idempotency key returns the original invoice instead of creating a duplicate.

nodes.name: test_finalized_invoice_lines_are_immutable
nodes.summary: Verifies that invoice lines cannot be modified once an invoice has been finalized.

nodes.name: test_finalize_writes_an_invoicing_log
nodes.summary: Verifies that finalizing a checkout writes an InvoicingLog audit record.

nodes.name: test_invoice_pdf_is_a_real_pdf
nodes.summary: Verifies that the invoice PDF endpoint returns a valid PDF document for a finalized invoice.

nodes.name: test_lots.py
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for lot (stock-receiving) endpoints, covering creation, role permissions, barcode validation, shop scoping, audit logging, and derived stock increases.

nodes.name: test_receiving_increases_derivable_stock
nodes.summary: Verifies that receiving a lot increases the product's derivable current stock as computed by the low-stock service.

nodes.name: test_receiving_writes_a_stockin_log
nodes.summary: Verifies that creating a lot writes a corresponding StockinLog audit record.

nodes.name: test_lot_listing_is_shop_scoped
nodes.summary: Verifies that listing lots only returns lots belonging to the actor's own shop.

nodes.name: test_duplicate_barcode_in_lot_rejected
nodes.summary: Verifies that a lot creation request containing duplicate barcodes across its lines is rejected.

nodes.name: users.py
nodes.summary: Small endpoint returning the current authenticated user's public profile.

nodes.name: me
nodes.summary: Returns the currently authenticated user's public profile as a validated response schema.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Application settings loaded from environment variables (via pydantic-settings), covering app metadata, JWT/security parameters, database URL, CORS, and background job intervals; exposes a cached get_settings() accessor.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Pydantic settings model defining all environment-configurable application parameters, including secret key, bcrypt rounds, database URL, and CORS origins.

nodes.name: get_settings
nodes.summary: Cached accessor that constructs and returns the singleton Settings instance.

nodes.name: jwt.py
nodes.summary: JWT token creation and decoding utilities used to issue and validate authentication tokens across the API.

nodes.name: TokenError
nodes.summary: Custom exception raised when a JWT token fails to decode or validate.

nodes.name: create_access_token
nodes.summary: Builds and signs a JWT access token embedding subject, shop_id, role, and expiry claims using the configured secret and algorithm.

nodes.name: decode_access_token
nodes.summary: Decodes and verifies a JWT token, raising TokenError on failure.

nodes.name: passwords.py
nodes.summary: Bcrypt-based password hashing and verification helpers used for account credential storage and login checks.

nodes.name: hash_password
nodes.summary: Hashes a plaintext password with bcrypt using the configured cost factor, truncating input to bcrypt's 72-byte limit.

nodes.name: verify_password
nodes.summary: Verifies a plaintext password against a stored bcrypt hash.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker file that makes the api directory a Python package.

nodes.name: _test_only.py
nodes.summary: Test-only placeholder router mounted only when app_env is 'test', kept empty now that role gates are exercised by real endpoints but retained so stale test references still compile.

nodes.name: health.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router providing liveness and readiness health-check endpoints, the latter verifying database connectivity.

nodes.name: shops.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router for shop resources: listing all shops (superadmin) and getting/updating the caller's own shop configuration (gstin, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold defaults).

nodes.name: logging_config.py
nodes.summary: Configures structlog-based structured JSON logging for the application, including a get_logger helper used throughout the API and CLI layers.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses structlog processors chained with stdlib logging integration to emit structured JSON log records.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Application entry point that builds the FastAPI app via create_app, wires the lifespan context (DB engine startup, background low-stock polling task), and mounts all API routers.

nodes.name: eod.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for end-of-day operations: sign-off requests/responses, EOD totals with payment-mode breakdown, sign-off history, pending void queue, and low-stock reporting responses.

nodes.name: shop.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for shop resources: public shop detail, summary listing, and update payload with GSTIN format validation.

nodes.name: eod.py
nodes.summary: Business logic for end-of-day operations: signing off a business day (marking invoices as signed off), computing day totals with payment-mode breakdown, sign-off history, and pending void queue retrieval.

nodes.name: liveness
nodes.summary: Simple liveness probe endpoint returning an ok status without dependencies.

nodes.name: readiness
nodes.summary: Readiness probe endpoint that executes a trivial query against the database to verify connectivity.

nodes.name: list_shops
nodes.summary: Endpoint listing all shops, restricted to superadmin role.

nodes.name: get_my_shop
nodes.summary: Endpoint returning the caller's own shop details, resolving the effective shop id from the actor's scope.

nodes.name: update_my_shop
nodes.summary: Endpoint updating configurable fields (gstin, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold default) on the caller's shop, applying only provided fields.

nodes.name: configure_logging
nodes.summary: Sets up structlog processors and stdlib logging handlers to produce structured JSON logs at the configured level, quieting noisy third-party loggers.

nodes.name: get_logger
nodes.summary: Returns a structlog logger bound to the given name, used throughout the app for structured logging.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: Async context manager that configures logging, initializes the DB engine, and starts/stops the background low-stock polling task for the app's lifetime.

nodes.name: _low_stock_loop
nodes.summary: Background loop that periodically checks each shop's inventory for low-stock items and logs findings.

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Application factory that instantiates FastAPI, attaches middleware, and mounts all feature routers (auth, checkout, dashboard, health, lots, products, shops, staff, users, voids).

nodes.name: _day_bounds
nodes.summary: Computes the start and end datetime bounds for a given business date.

nodes.name: sign_off_day
nodes.summary: Signs off a business day for a shop, marking all finalized non-voided invoices for that day as EOD signed-off and recording an EodSignOff row, raising EodError on invalid/duplicate sign-offs.

nodes.name: get_day_totals
nodes.summary: Computes EOD totals for a shop/date including revenue, voided/reversal counts, and payment-mode breakdown from invoices and payments.

nodes.name: list_signoff_history
nodes.summary: Retrieves historical EOD sign-off records for a shop within an optional date range, limited by count.

nodes.name: list_pending_voids
nodes.summary: Retrieves invoices currently pending void approval for a shop, ordered by void request time.

nodes.name: SignOffRequest
nodes.summary: Request schema for signing off a business date, validating the date is not too far in the past.

nodes.name: SignOffResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema describing the result of a sign-off operation, including invoice count signed off.

nodes.name: EodTotalsResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema for EOD totals including revenue, voided/reversal counts, and payments-by-mode breakdown.

nodes.name: SignOffHistoryResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema wrapping a list of historical sign-off records.

nodes.name: PendingVoidResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema wrapping a list of invoices pending void approval.

nodes.name: LowStockItem
nodes.summary: Schema representing a single low-stock product with its current stock and effective threshold.

nodes.name: LowStockResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema wrapping a list of low-stock items with an evaluation timestamp.

nodes.name: ShopPublic
nodes.summary: Public representation of a shop including gstin, excise duty rate, and low-stock threshold default.

nodes.name: ShopSummary
nodes.summary: Lightweight shop summary used in shop listings.

nodes.name: ShopUpdate
nodes.summary: Update payload schema for shop configuration fields with GSTIN format validation.

nodes.name: EodError
nodes.summary: Domain exception raised for invalid or duplicate EOD sign-off operations.

nodes.name: SignOffResult
nodes.summary: Internal result object carrying the created EodSignOff record and number of invoices signed off.

nodes.name: EodTotals
nodes.summary: Internal data class representing computed EOD totals prior to schema serialization.

nodes.name: checkout.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request/response schemas for the checkout API, including cart line validation, payment total validation, and invoice serialization.

nodes.name: CheckoutLine
nodes.summary: Input schema for a single cart line consisting of a product barcode and quantity.

nodes.name: PaymentInput
nodes.summary: Input schema for a single payment consisting of a payment mode and amount.

nodes.name: CheckoutFinalizeRequest
nodes.summary: Request schema for finalizing a checkout, bundling cart lines and payments with a validator ensuring payments sum to a non-empty amount.

nodes.name: InvoiceLinePublic
nodes.summary: Response schema serializing an invoice line's product, quantity, unit price, and line total.

nodes.name: PaymentPublic
nodes.summary: Response schema serializing a payment's mode and amount.

nodes.name: InvoicePublic
nodes.summary: Response schema serializing a full invoice with its lines, payments, status, and sign-off state for API consumers.

nodes.name: CheckoutFinalizeResponse
nodes.summary: Response wrapper indicating the finalized invoice and whether the response was returned from an idempotent replay.

nodes.name: invoice_pdf.py
nodes.summary: Renders a finalized invoice as a printable PDF receipt (shop header, line items, payment breakdown) using ReportLab.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds the document as a ReportLab 'story' of flowables (Paragraph, Table, Spacer) rendered into an in-memory BytesIO buffer.

nodes.name: render_invoice_pdf
nodes.summary: Builds and returns the raw PDF bytes for a given invoice, including shop details, GSTIN/excise info, itemized lines, and payment methods.

nodes.name: test_eod.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests covering end-of-day sign-off (creation, double sign-off rejection, future-date rejection, role restriction), EOD revenue totals, sign-off history, and the void approval queue.

nodes.name: _finalize
nodes.summary: Test helper that posts a checkout request with a random idempotency key and returns the finalized invoice JSON.

nodes.name: test_owner_signs_off_today
nodes.summary: Verifies an owner can successfully sign off the current business date after sales have been recorded.

nodes.name: test_double_sign_off_returns_409
nodes.summary: Verifies signing off the same business date twice is rejected with a 409 conflict.

nodes.name: test_checkout_rejected_after_eod_sign_off
nodes.summary: Verifies that once the business day is signed off, further checkout attempts for that day are rejected.

nodes.name: test_eod_totals_for_signed_off_day
nodes.summary: Verifies EOD totals endpoint returns correct aggregated revenue for a day after sign-off.

nodes.name: test_eod_totals_for_unsigned_day_returns_zero_signed_off_false
nodes.summary: Verifies EOD totals for a day that has not been signed off yet reports zero revenue and signed_off=false.

nodes.name: test_eod_totals_excludes_voided_and_reversal_from_revenue
nodes.summary: Verifies that voided invoices and their reversal entries are excluded from EOD revenue totals.

nodes.name: test_eod_history_lists_signoffs_in_descending_order
nodes.summary: Verifies the EOD sign-off history endpoint returns past sign-offs ordered most-recent first.

nodes.name: test_eod_history_filters_by_date_range
nodes.summary: Verifies the EOD sign-off history endpoint correctly filters results by a given date range.

nodes.name: test_void_queue_lists_pending_invoices
nodes.summary: Verifies the owner void queue endpoint lists invoices with a pending post-EOD void request.

nodes.name: test_void_queue_excludes_resolved_voids
nodes.summary: Verifies that once a post-EOD void request is approved, it no longer appears in the pending void queue.

nodes.name: test_eod_signoff_record_persists
nodes.summary: Verifies that signing off a business date persists exactly one EodSignOff database record.

nodes.name: shop.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy ORM model defining the Shop entity, the tenant/store record holding shop code, GST and excise settings, invoice numbering state, and low-stock defaults for the single-counter liquor billing system.

nodes.name: Shop
nodes.summary: ORM model for a single shop/tenant, storing identity (code, name), GST/excise configuration, default low-stock threshold, a running invoice number counter, and a relationship to its users.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest fixture module that provisions an isolated per-test Postgres database (via Alembic migrations and asyncpg), an async HTTP test client wired to the FastAPI app, and role-scoped user/client fixtures (owner, receiver, cashier, superadmin) shared across the test suite.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pytest-asyncio session/function-scoped fixtures plus asyncpg admin connections to create and tear down a disposable test database per test session.

nodes.name: test_db_dsn
nodes.summary: Session-scoped fixture that creates a throwaway Postgres database for the test run, applies Alembic migrations against it, yields its DSN, and drops the database on teardown.

nodes.name: _truncate_tables
nodes.summary: Truncates all application tables between tests so each test starts from a clean database state without re-running migrations.

nodes.name: db_session
nodes.summary: Function-scoped fixture that truncates tables and yields a fresh SQLAlchemy async session bound to the test database for direct data setup/assertions in tests.

nodes.name: client
nodes.summary: Function-scoped fixture providing an async HTTP client (httpx AsyncClient over ASGITransport) wired directly to the FastAPI app for integration-style API tests.

nodes.name: _make_user
nodes.summary: Helper that constructs and persists a User row with a hashed password for a given shop and role, backing the owner/receiver/cashier/superadmin fixtures.

nodes.name: owner
nodes.summary: Fixture that creates an OWNER-role user scoped to the test shop via _make_user, for tests exercising owner-level permissions.

nodes.name: receiver
nodes.summary: Fixture that creates a RECEIVER-role user scoped to the test shop via _make_user, for tests exercising stock-receiving permissions.

nodes.name: cashier
nodes.summary: Fixture that creates a CASHIER-role user scoped to the test shop via _make_user, for tests exercising checkout/billing permissions.

nodes.name: superadmin
nodes.summary: Fixture that creates a SUPERADMIN-role user via _make_user, for tests exercising cross-shop administrative permissions.

nodes.name: _make_logged_in_client
nodes.summary: Helper that logs a given user in through the auth endpoint and returns an authenticated async HTTP client, backing the owner_client/receiver_client/cashier_client/superadmin_client fixtures.

nodes.name: test_low_stock.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the low-stock alert list endpoint, covering shop-level default thresholds, per-product threshold overrides, stock depletion via sales, RBAC visibility for owner/receiver roles, urgency sorting, and exclusion of inactive products.

nodes.name: _finalize
nodes.summary: Test helper that finalizes a checkout for a given barcode/quantity/amount via the cashier client, simulating a sale that depletes stock.

nodes.name: test_no_default_no_overrides_returns_empty
nodes.summary: Verifies the low-stock list is empty when neither a shop default nor a per-product threshold override is configured.

nodes.name: test_per_product_override_triggers_alert
nodes.summary: Verifies that setting a per-product low-stock threshold override causes the product to appear in the low-stock list once stock falls at or below it.

nodes.name: test_product_above_threshold_not_in_list
nodes.summary: Verifies a product with stock above the shop's default low-stock threshold does not appear in the low-stock list.

nodes.name: test_product_at_threshold_appears
nodes.summary: Verifies a product with stock exactly at the shop's default low-stock threshold is included in the low-stock list (inclusive boundary check).

nodes.name: test_sale_brings_product_below_threshold
nodes.summary: Verifies that finalizing a checkout which depletes stock below the threshold causes the product to newly appear in the low-stock list.

nodes.name: test_per_product_override_beats_shop_default
nodes.summary: Verifies that a per-product low-stock threshold override takes precedence over the shop-wide default threshold when both are configured.

nodes.name: test_list_sorted_most_urgent_first
nodes.summary: Verifies the low-stock list is sorted with the most urgent (lowest relative stock) products first.

nodes.name: test_receiver_can_view_low_stock
nodes.summary: Verifies that a RECEIVER-role user is permitted to view the low-stock list, confirming RBAC allows receiving staff visibility into stock alerts.

nodes.name: test_low_stock_inactive_products_excluded
nodes.summary: Verifies that inactive (deactivated) products are excluded from the low-stock list even if their stock is below threshold.

nodes.name: test_products.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the product catalog API covering RBAC-gated creation, duplicate-barcode conflict handling, barcode lookup, shop-scoped listing (including superadmin cross-shop access), price/threshold updates, and CSV bulk import (happy path, per-row errors, missing columns, UTF-8 BOM handling).

nodes.name: test_owner_creates_product
nodes.summary: Verifies an OWNER-role user can successfully create a new product via the API.

nodes.name: test_duplicate_barcode_rejected_with_409
nodes.summary: Verifies creating a product with a barcode that already exists for the shop returns a 409 conflict response.

nodes.name: test_each_bottle_size_is_a_separate_product
nodes.summary: Verifies that different bottle sizes of the same brand are tracked as distinct product records rather than being merged.

nodes.name: test_lookup_by_barcode_succeeds_for_cashier
nodes.summary: Verifies a CASHIER-role user can look up product details by scanning/entering a barcode during checkout.

nodes.name: test_manual_barcode_entry_falls_back_through_lookup
nodes.summary: Verifies that manually typed barcode entry (as opposed to scanning) still resolves correctly through the product lookup endpoint.

nodes.name: test_superadmin_shop_id_scopes_list_and_lookup
nodes.summary: Verifies that a superadmin's product list and lookup requests are correctly scoped by an explicit shop_id parameter across multiple shops, while a regular owner remains restricted to their own shop.

nodes.name: test_owner_updates_price_and_threshold
nodes.summary: Verifies an owner can update a product's price and low-stock threshold override via a PATCH request.

nodes.name: test_csv_import_happy_path
nodes.summary: Verifies a well-formed CSV file of products imports successfully via the bulk import endpoint.

nodes.name: test_csv_import_per_row_errors_are_surfaced
nodes.summary: Verifies that invalid individual rows within a CSV import are reported as per-row errors rather than failing the whole import.

nodes.name: test_csv_import_with_low_stock_threshold_column
nodes.summary: Verifies the CSV import correctly applies a per-product low-stock threshold column when present in the uploaded file.

nodes.name: test_csv_import_handles_utf8_bom
nodes.summary: Verifies the CSV import correctly handles files that begin with a UTF-8 byte order mark (BOM), a common artifact from Excel exports.

nodes.name: test_shops.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for shop configuration (GSTIN, excise duty rate) and invoice PDF generation, verifying RBAC restrictions, input validation, and that shop-specific tax settings and disclaimers render correctly on generated invoices rather than being hardcoded.

nodes.name: _finalize
nodes.summary: Test helper that finalizes a checkout for a given barcode/quantity/amount via the cashier client, used to produce an invoice for PDF assertions.

nodes.name: test_get_shop_returns_defaults
nodes.summary: Verifies the shop settings GET endpoint returns the expected default GSTIN and excise duty rate values for a newly created shop.

nodes.name: test_owner_updates_gstin_and_duty_rate
nodes.summary: Verifies an owner can update the shop's GSTIN and excise duty rate via a PATCH request and that the change is persisted.

nodes.name: test_pdf_includes_configured_gstin
nodes.summary: Verifies that a shop's configured GSTIN appears in the generated invoice PDF text after a sale is finalized.

nodes.name: test_pdf_includes_configured_duty_rate
nodes.summary: Verifies that a shop's configured excise duty rate appears in the generated invoice PDF text after a sale is finalized.

nodes.name: test_pdf_includes_placeholder_disclaimer
nodes.summary: Verifies the generated invoice PDF includes a placeholder tax disclaimer text where applicable.

nodes.name: test_pdf_does_not_hardcode_cgst_or_sgst
nodes.summary: Verifies the invoice PDF does not contain hardcoded CGST/SGST tax labels, ensuring tax terminology is driven by shop configuration rather than fixed literals.

nodes.name: test_shop_name_appears_on_invoice
nodes.summary: Verifies the shop's name is correctly rendered on the generated invoice PDF for a finalized sale.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment file listing all runtime configuration variables (app metadata, JWT/auth secrets, bcrypt cost, async Postgres DSN, and CORS origins) that must be copied to `.env` for local development.

nodes.name: alembic.ini
nodes.summary: Alembic migration tool configuration defining the migrations directory, file naming template, and logging setup used to manage the SQLAlchemy-backed Postgres schema.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose definition that runs a local Postgres 16 container (with health check and named volume) for development and test use, matching credentials expected by the app's DATABASE_URL.

nodes.name: 00-intake.md
nodes.summary: Initial intake notes for the Barstock project, restating the problem, listing unknowns, decomposing the raw feature wishlist, and surveying existing commercial liquor-POS market options before Phase 0 sign-off.

nodes.name: 01-branch-map.md
nodes.summary: Structural map of the project split into 14 branches (personas, domain model, API surface, frontend, persistence, auth, integrations, observability, failure modes, testing, performance, deployment, compliance, and docs) used to sequence the Phase 2 grilling session.

nodes.name: 02-ledger.md
nodes.summary: Running decisions ledger capturing numbered decisions (D-#) made during Phase 0 confirmation, the Phase 2 grill, a follow-up logging brainstorm, and the Phase 4 absence hunt, plus a list of open threads not yet resolved.

nodes.name: 03-prd.md
nodes.summary: Frozen product requirements document for Barstock, a scan-driven counter inventory and billing system for a liquor retail shop, covering goals, non-goals, per-branch requirements, personas, deferred v1 items, and an appendix reproducing the decisions ledger verbatim.

nodes.name: 04-absences.md
nodes.summary: Absence-hunt findings document listing requirements or edge cases missing from the earlier PRD draft (feeding decisions R-40 through R-46) and their disposition before the PRD was re-frozen.

nodes.name: prd_frontend.md
nodes.summary: Frontend-specific PRD for the Barstock web SPA, defining the problem statement, solution approach, user stories, implementation and testing decisions, and out-of-scope items for the client application.

nodes.name: README
nodes.summary: Standard Alembic-generated placeholder README marking the migrations directory (single-line boilerplate, generic single-database configuration note).

nodes.name: script.py.mako
nodes.summary: Mako template used by Alembic's revision generator to scaffold new migration files with upgrade/downgrade stubs and revision metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Mako templating directives (${...}) interleave with Python to auto-populate revision IDs and docstrings when `alembic revision` is run.

nodes.name: 0243c7acf544_foundation_shops_users_log_tables.py
nodes.summary: Foundational Alembic migration that creates the core shops, users, and log/audit tables establishing the multi-shop schema baseline.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates the shops, users, and several log/audit tables with columns, foreign keys, unique constraints, and indexes.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Reverses the foundation migration by dropping the indexes and tables created in upgrade.

nodes.name: 058759837183_eod_eod_signed_off_at_eod_signoffs_table.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding the eod_signoffs table and an eod_signed_off_at timestamp/foreign-key column, supporting end-of-day sign-off tracking.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates the eod_signoffs table and adds an eod_signed_off_at column plus foreign key on a related table.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Reverts the EOD sign-off changes by dropping the added constraint, columns, and table.

nodes.name: 2e68e776867b_voids_void_reversal_pending_void_status_.py
nodes.summary: Migration introducing void/reversal tracking columns and a pending-void status field, likely for invoice line voiding workflows.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Adds void/reversal columns, an index, and two foreign key constraints supporting void tracking.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Rolls back the void/reversal schema changes by dropping the constraints, index, and columns.

nodes.name: 3efd6817d954_lots_lot_lot_lines_tables.py
nodes.summary: Migration creating the lots and lot_lines tables used to track stock-receiving lots and their line items.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates the lots table and the dependent lot_lines table with foreign keys, primary keys, and indexes.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops the lot_lines and lots tables and their indexes to reverse the migration.

nodes.name: 423948112aae_products_catalog_shop_low_stock_.py
nodes.summary: Migration creating the products catalog table (per-shop) with pricing and stock fields, and adding a low-stock threshold column.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates the products/catalog table scoped by shop with pricing, quantity, and unique constraints, and adds a low-stock threshold column.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Reverses the products/catalog migration by dropping the added column, indexes, and table.

nodes.name: af4b5e908f57_shops_gstin_excise_duty_rate_for_8_gst_.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding GSTIN and excise duty rate columns to the shops table to support India-specific tax compliance fields.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Adds a GSTIN string column and an excise duty rate numeric column to the shops table.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops the GSTIN and excise duty rate columns from the shops table.

nodes.name: c514c436a0b1_eod_eod_signoffs_business_date_to_date.py
nodes.summary: Migration changing the eod_signoffs business_date column type from timestamp to plain date.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Alters the eod_signoffs.business_date column type from TIMESTAMP to DATE.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Reverts business_date back to a TIMESTAMP column type on eod_signoffs.

nodes.name: ea0fba754aaa_invoices_invoice_lines_payments_.py
nodes.summary: Migration creating the invoices, invoice_lines, and payments tables that model the billing/checkout domain.

nodes.name: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates the invoices, invoice_lines, and payments tables with foreign keys, enums for status, numeric pricing columns, and indexes.

nodes.name: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops the payments, invoice_lines, and invoices tables and their indexes/columns to reverse the migration.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker for the app.schemas package (Pydantic request/response schemas live in sibling modules not in this batch).

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker for the app.security package (authentication/authorization logic lives in sibling modules not in this batch).

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker for the app.services package (business/service-layer modules live elsewhere in the project).

nodes.name: barstock_design.md
nodes.summary: Early frontend design specification for Barstock covering brand identity, color palette, typography, and the four core screens (Login PIN Pad, Checkout Sales Counter, Stock Receiving, Owner Dashboard & EOD) plus responsive strategy.

nodes.name: code.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML/CSS mockup prototyping a POS inventory screen, part of the early frontend_initial design exploration that predates the real frontend app.

nodes.name: code.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML/CSS mockup for the Checkout - Sales Counter screen, prototyping the scanned-item list and stat cards described in the design docs.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: General design-system reference documenting brand/style, colors, typography, layout/spacing, elevation, shapes, and component specs (PIN Pad, Scanned Item Row, Stat Card, Buttons, Inputs) for the early frontend prototypes.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: Duplicate copy of the general design-system reference (brand, colors, typography, component specs) scoped to the 'high efficiency retail pos' mockup variant.

nodes.name: code.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML/CSS mockup for the Login - PIN Pad screen, prototyping numeric PIN entry for staff sign-in.

nodes.name: code.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML/CSS mockup for the Owner Dashboard & EOD screen, prototyping end-of-day sign-off and owner reporting views.

nodes.name: code.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML/CSS mockup for the Stock Receiving - New Lot screen, prototyping the lot-entry workflow that pairs with the lots/lot_lines migration.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project-harness documentation tracking the status of the '05 — Issues' stage, likely part of a staged development/planning workflow for the project.

nodes.name: test_authorization.py
nodes.summary: Pytest suite verifying role-based access control, confirming receiver/cashier roles get 403 on owner-only staff endpoints while superadmin can list all staff.

nodes.name: test_health.py
nodes.summary: Pytest suite verifying the liveness endpoint responds OK and the readiness endpoint successfully queries the database.

nodes.name: test_log_tables.py
nodes.summary: Async integration tests verifying that the invoicing_logs, stockin_logs, and admin_logs tables exist in the database and that each contains its required columns.

nodes.name: test_three_log_tables_exist
nodes.summary: Queries information_schema.tables to assert that invoicing_logs, stockin_logs, and admin_logs tables all exist in the database.

nodes.name: test_log_tables_have_required_columns
nodes.summary: Queries information_schema.columns for each log table and asserts that the expected set of columns is present.

nodes.name: jwt.ts
nodes.summary: Client-side JWT helper providing base64url payload decoding and expiry checking without any external dependency.
nodes.languageNotes: Manually converts base64url to base64 and pads it before using atob, avoiding a JWT library dependency.

nodes.name: decodeJwt
nodes.summary: Decodes the payload segment of a JWT string into a JS object, returning null on malformed tokens.

nodes.name: isExpired
nodes.summary: Checks whether a decoded JWT payload's exp claim has passed, with an optional clock-skew allowance.

nodes.name: PinPad.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable numeric keypad component used for PIN/phone/password entry with digit, backspace, clear, and submit callbacks plus keyboard support.

nodes.name: PinPad
nodes.summary: Renders a numeric keypad grid and wires both on-screen button clicks and physical keyboard input to the provided digit/backspace/clear/submit handlers.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap entry point that mounts the React tree, wiring AuthProvider and ShopScopeProvider around the App component and importing global styles.

nodes.name: AdminPlaceholder.tsx
nodes.summary: Placeholder page shown for admin routes not yet implemented, displaying the current path for context.

nodes.name: AdminPlaceholder
nodes.summary: Renders a simple placeholder message referencing the current route path via useLocation.

nodes.name: ForbiddenPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Error page shown when an authenticated user attempts to access a route their role does not permit.

nodes.name: ForbiddenPage
nodes.summary: Renders a 403-style access denied message, reading the current user from useAuth for context.

nodes.name: HomeRedirect.tsx
nodes.summary: Redirect component that sends an authenticated user to the default landing page for their role.

nodes.name: HomeRedirect
nodes.summary: Reads the current user's role via useAuth and issues a Navigate redirect to homePathFor(role).

nodes.name: SuperadminLoginPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Login page for superadmin users using username/password fields, authenticating via the API and redirecting to the superadmin dashboard.

nodes.name: SuperadminLoginPage
nodes.summary: Renders a username/password login form, calls Api.loginSuperadmin, stores the session via useAuth's login, and navigates to the superadmin dashboard on success.

nodes.name: voids.ts
nodes.summary: API calls to request, approve, and reject invoice voids, and list pending voids for approval.

nodes.name: requestVoid
nodes.summary: Submits a request to void an invoice with a reason.

nodes.name: approveVoid
nodes.summary: Approves a pending invoice void request by invoice ID.

nodes.name: rejectVoid
nodes.summary: Rejects a pending invoice void request with a reason.

nodes.name: listPendingVoids
nodes.summary: Fetches the list of pending void requests for a shop awaiting approval.

nodes.name: InvoiceLookupPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Page allowing staff to look up an invoice by numeric ID, view its line items and payments, and request a void.

nodes.name: InvoiceLookupPage
nodes.summary: Component that validates an invoice ID input, fetches invoice details, renders line items and payment breakdown, and lets the user submit a void request.

nodes.name: ShopPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown component shown to superadmins that lists all shops and lets them switch their 'acting shop' scope, persisted via ShopScopeProvider.

nodes.name: ShopPicker
nodes.summary: Loads the shop list on mount for superadmins and renders a select control bound to the shop-scope context, allowing the acting shop to be changed.

nodes.name: ShopConfigPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Owner/superadmin settings page for viewing and editing shop configuration (GSTIN, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold), with load/save state handling and shop-scope awareness.

nodes.name: ShopConfigPage
nodes.summary: Page component that loads the current (possibly scoped) shop's configuration, manages form state for GSTIN/duty rate/threshold, validates and saves updates via the shops API, and surfaces load/save errors and success info.

nodes.name: Field
nodes.summary: Reusable labeled input field component used to render each editable shop-config attribute with consistent styling and change handling.

nodes.name: finalize-queue.ts
nodes.summary: Implements a localStorage-backed offline queue for checkout finalize requests, letting sales be recorded locally and later flushed to the API when connectivity returns.

nodes.name: useOnlineStatus.ts
nodes.summary: React hook that tracks browser online/offline connectivity by subscribing to window online and offline events.

nodes.name: useRetryQueue.ts
nodes.summary: React hook that combines online-status detection with the finalize queue to automatically flush pending offline checkouts when the app regains connectivity or on a polling interval.

nodes.name: readQueue
nodes.summary: Reads and parses the queued finalize items from localStorage, defensively returning an empty array on missing or invalid data.

nodes.name: enqueueFinalize
nodes.summary: Adds (or replaces) a checkout finalize payload in the persisted offline queue, keyed by idempotency key, for later submission.

nodes.name: listQueued
nodes.summary: Returns the current list of queued finalize items, used to render pending offline sales in the UI.

nodes.name: clearQueued
nodes.summary: Removes a specific queued item (by key) from the persisted offline finalize queue, used when a user dismisses a failed queued sale.

nodes.name: flushQueue
nodes.summary: Attempts to submit every queued finalize request to the API, removing successful ones from the queue and collecting per-item success/failure outcomes for the caller.

nodes.name: useOnlineStatus
nodes.summary: Hook returning a boolean reflecting the browser's current network connectivity, updated live via online/offline event listeners.

nodes.name: useRetryQueue
nodes.summary: Hook that automatically flushes the offline finalize queue when the browser comes back online and on a periodic interval, tracking the count of pending items and invoking an onFlush callback with outcomes.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite application HTML shell that provides the root DOM mount point and loads the TypeScript entry module for the React SPA.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root project manifest for the barstock-frontend React/TypeScript SPA, declaring dependencies (React Router, React DOM), dev tooling (Vite, ESLint, Tailwind, Playwright, openapi-typescript) and scripts for dev, build, lint, API type generation, and e2e testing.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a gen:api script that runs openapi-typescript against a sibling ../openapi.json to generate src/api/schema.ts, tying the frontend build to an external API contract.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for the application source code (compiler options plus include/exclude paths), separate from node tooling and e2e test configs.

nodes.name: tsconfig.e2e.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration scoped to Playwright end-to-end test files, with its own compiler options and include paths.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript solution file that references the app, node, and e2e project configs via TypeScript's project-references mechanism, enabling the composite build (tsc -b) used in the build script.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript project references (files + references arrays) to compose multiple sub-tsconfigs into a single build graph.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for Node-side tooling (e.g. Vite config file), with its own compiler options and include paths distinct from the app and e2e configs.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: Flat ESLint configuration for the React/TypeScript frontend, wiring up TypeScript, React hooks, and React Refresh linting rules across the project.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright test runner configuration pointing at the e2e/ test directory, defining the base URL, Chromium project, retry/trace policy, and a webServer block that boots the built frontend against the FastAPI backend for CI.

nodes.name: postcss.config.cjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for the build pipeline.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet that loads Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers and defines a few root-level style resets for the application.

nodes.name: tokens.ts
nodes.summary: Design token module exporting a shared `tokens` object (colors, spacing, and related design constants) consumed by the Tailwind configuration to keep styling consistent across the app.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite-generated ambient type declaration file that pulls in Vite's client types for the TypeScript compiler.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme using the shared design tokens module and sets the content paths for class scanning.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration wiring up the React plugin and dev server settings for the frontend application.
